title: Surescripts - Intelligent Prior Authorization & Health Intelligence Network
problem: Healthcare needs trusted infrastructure for sharing clinical and benefit intelligence. Prior authorization is manual and slow. Medication decisions lack real-time benefit and price information.
solution: Network Alliance connecting healthcare ecosystem. Intelligent Prior Authorization for faster decisions. Benefit & Price Intelligence for medication decisions. Interoperability for care transitions. 30.5B network transactions in 2025.
technology: Health information network, prior auth APIs, benefit intelligence, interoperability
target_customer: EHR vendors, health plans, health systems, pharmacies, PBMs
traction_signals: Virtually all insured Americans in Master Patient Index
regulatory_notes: HIPAA compliant, NCPDP standards, DEA compliance
varden_fit: CRITICAL — Surescripts IS US healthcare intelligence infrastructure. Their Intelligent Prior Auth and Benefit Intelligence models are exactly what European healthcare needs. No European equivalent.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Health intelligence infrastructure is essential but unsexy. Surescripts proves network effects create massive value. Europe lacks this.
